form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split but had to be content with second when clocking 22.77 over 400m at Gawler. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split but had to be content with second when clocking 22.77 over 400m at Gawler. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and raced wide turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (21.93) when fourth over 375m at Broken Hill in a NG. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from eight starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (21.93) when fourth over 375m at Broken Hill in a NG. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from eight starts. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Finished fourth (17.28) last start at Murray Bridge Straight. Prior to that had recorded four minor placings in a row. Drawn a inside box but looks a each way chance only this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished fourth (17.28) last start at Murray Bridge Straight. Prior to that had recorded four minor placings in a row. Drawn a inside box but looks a each way chance only this field.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Murray Bridge Straight over 300m (17.05) beating Loving It Sweet in Grade 4 on April 8. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Murray Bridge Straight over 300m (17.05) beating Loving It Sweet in Grade 4 on April 8. Others better.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a NG at Broken Hill when a 3.5 lengths second but did run a hot 21.68 for the 375m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time in a NG at Broken Hill when a 3.5 lengths second but did run a hot 21.68 for the 375m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Murray Bridge Straight (17.40) in a Grade 6, finishing a 5 length third. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at Murray Bridge Straight (17.40) in a Grade 6, finishing a 5 length third. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.81) when fourth over 395m at Murray Bridge in a Grade 6. Has two wins and two placings from seven starts from the draw. Makes strong appeal.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (22.81) when fourth over 395m at Murray Bridge in a Grade 6. Has two wins and two placings from seven starts from the draw. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 342m at this track. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.
